info.name: Claude Bot
info.summary: Chat with Claude AI in Nextcloud Talk — requires Claude Code CLI on your server
info.description:
## Claude Bot for Nextcloud Talk
Chat with Anthropic's Claude AI directly in Nextcloud Talk. Send text, voice messages, or files — Claude responds right in the conversation.
### Important: This app alone is only the permission manager!
This Nextcloud app manages **who is allowed** to use the bot. To actually chat with Claude, you also need to run the **Python bot service** with **Claude Code CLI** on a separate machine. Without the bot service, this app does nothing on its own.
### What you need (two parts)
1. **This Nextcloud app** (install on your Nextcloud) — Permission manager: controls which users and groups are allowed to interact with the bot 2. **Python bot service + Claude Code CLI** (run on any machine) — The actual bot: connects Nextcloud Talk to Claude AI, processes messages and sends responses
**Bot service requirements (runs on any machine):** - [Claude Code CLI](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code) installed and authenticated (requires an Anthropic API key) - Python 3.9+ - A dedicated Nextcloud user for the bot (e.g. `bot-claude`) - Network access to your Nextcloud instance (HTTPS) - The bot service from the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/chrischris616/nextcloud-claudebot)
The bot service just needs to reach your Nextcloud via HTTPS — it can run on a laptop, a VPS, a Raspberry Pi, or anywhere else. It logs in as the bot user and polls Nextcloud Talk for new messages.
### Features - **Text chat** — Ask Claude anything, get responses in Talk - **Voice messages** — Automatically transcribed and answered (optional, requires faster-whisper + GPU) - **File attachments** — Send images, PDFs, or documents for Claude to analyze - **Multi-room** — Works in 1:1 chats and group conversations - **Per-user sessions** — Each user has their own conversation context - **User & group permissions** — Control who can use the bot via admin UI - **Bot commands** — /model, /clear, /cost, /effort, /stop, /help
### Setup
1. Install this app on your Nextcloud instance 2. Create a Nextcloud user for the bot (e.g. `bot-claude`) 3. Add allowed users/groups in Settings → Administration → Claude Bot 4. Clone the [bot service](https://github.com/chrischris616/nextcloud-claudebot) on your server 5. Install Claude Code CLI and authenticate it 6. Configure and start the bot service (see GitHub README for details)
### How it works
``` User (Talk) → Bot Service → Claude Code CLI → Response back to Talk ↓ Permission check via this app's API ```
The bot user can be configured via `occ config:app:set claudebot bot_user --value="your-bot-user"`.
info.author: Chris
